title: Large Square Wall Cubby Organizer
summary: A wall-mounted grid of small cubbies built from 1x6 shelves and dividers on a plywood back — sized for sorting small items into their own individual compartments.
description:
Six 1x6 shelves span between two 1x6 sides, and twenty short divider pieces slot between the shelves to break the interior into a genuine grid of small, individual cubbies — this is a much finer-grained storage layout than a plain shelf unit, built specifically for small items that need their own compartment rather than a shared shelf.

Build the shelf-and-divider grid on a flat surface, checking that each divider lands square to its shelf before nailing and gluing, since a grid this repetitive shows any misalignment across every row. The plywood back closes the whole assembly in and gives it the rigidity to hang flat on a wall.

Mount with a picture hanging kit into a wall stud, or use rated anchors if no stud lines up — a fully loaded grid of small cubbies adds up in weight faster than it looks like it would.

materials.name: 1/4" plywood, at least 28-1/4 in x 32 in

cutList.material: 1/4" plywood, at least 28-1/4 in x 32 in

steps.title: Cut all the parts
steps.body: Cut six shelves at 30-1/2", 20 cubby dividers at 4-3/4" and two sides at 31-1/2" from the 1x6. Cut one back at 32" from the 1/4" plywood, at least 28-1/4 in x 32 in. Allowing about 1/8" for each saw cut, that comes to four 8 ft 1x6. Square every cut and label each piece as it comes off the saw — several parts here are within half an inch of each other and are easy to mix up later.
materials: 1/4" plywood, at least 28-1/4 in x 32 in

steps.title: Build the shelf grid
steps.body: Assemble the six shelves and twenty dividers between the two sides, checking each divider is square to its shelf.

steps.title: Attach the back
steps.body: Nail the plywood back panel to the assembled grid.
materials: 1/4" plywood, at least 28-1/4 in x 32 in

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Fill any gaps with wood filler, sand, and apply your finishing supplies.

steps.title: Mount to the wall
steps.body: Mount with a picture hanging kit into a wall stud, or rated anchors if no stud lines up.

unresolvedImages.alt: Large square wall cubby organizer grid
